subject: Add CLAMP E2E tests

Patch Set 9:

Thanks Amine

I added Sébastien (for Clamp) and Andreas/Michal for the structure.
As this repo will host several scenarios, we shall converge on the directory structure.

I expect to see the existing onap-tests scenarios
- basic_vm
- freeraidus_nbi
- clearwater_ims

and new ones
- basic_network
- basic_cnf
..

see discussion on the etherpad https://etherpad.opnfv.org/p/onap_integration_onapsdk_scenarios

as far as I understand for the moment, you indicate the scenario by a python Class at the root of the dir run_*

I would maybe prefer (to be discussed) something like 
├── conf
│   └── clouds.yaml
├── docs
│   ├── conf.py
│   └── requirements-docs.txt
├── INFO.yaml
├── README.md
├── requirements.txt
├── setup.cfg
├── setup.py
├── src
│   └── onaptests
│       ├── actions
│       │   ├── cloudresources.py
│       │   ├── common.py
│       │   ├── delete.py
│       │   ├── e2e.py
│       │   ├── __init__.py
│       │   ├── instantiate_loop.py
│       │   ├── instantiate.py
│       │   ├── onboard_clamp.py
│       │   └── onboard.py
│       ├── configuration
│       │   ├── clampnode.yaml
│       │   ├── __init__.py
│       │   └── settings.py
│       ├── endpoints
│       │   ├── __init__.py
│       │   ├── run_basic_clamp.py
│       │   ├── run_basic_vm.py
│       │   ├── run_closed_loop.py
│       │   └── run_onboard_clamp_artifact.py
│       ├── examples
│       │   ├── run_delete.py
│       │   ├── run_e2e.py
│       │   ├── run_instantiate.py
│       │   └── run_onboard.py
│       ├── __init__.py
│       └── scenarios
│           ├── clamp.py
│           ├── __init__.py
│           └── scenario.py
├── templates
│   └── vnf-services
│       └── ubuntu16test-service.yaml
├── tests
│   ├── test_cloudresources.py
│   ├── test_common.py
│   ├── test_instantiate.py
│   └── test_onboard.py
└── tox.ini

I add the topic to the integration meeting planned tomorrow
